productDisplayName: Timberland Women Femmes Tan Casual Shoes
description: Your search for that absolutely comfortable walking shoe comes to an end with the timberland Pathlite Low Gore-Tex shoe. With a smooth suede, nubuck and mesh upper, this shoe offers comfort at its best.UpperMesh upper made of Gore-Tex for absolute breathable comfort and waterproofingStrategically placed suede and nubuck overlays for enhanced shoe structurePadded tongue and collar for snug, breathable comfortHaul loop to sling shoes from a backpackLeather toe box and heel cap for enhanced durabilityAgile IQ System foam footbed with perforations for enhanced all-day comfortMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with multi-directional lugs for absolute grip and tractionPropel technology in the toe region for absolute tractionFlex grooves in the forefoot for easy movementBrake system in the back heel for absolute grip on various terrainArched midfoot for enhanced supportShoe careWipe dust with a dry, clean clothUse a nubuck and suede brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
